PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Processo $proc encerrado." } else { Write-Host "Nenhum processo na porta 3000." })
